title: spec_driven_query_formulation_v1
description: spec_driven_v1 N2 Query Formulation output. queries = one search query per slot. query_text = BM25 lexical anchors (literal keywords + explicit_reference tokens verbatim). collection = corpus collection (one of 17, or null); collection_mode = 'boost' (additive, recall-safe; default) or 'filter' (hard-restricts the search population to that collection — only when confident the answer lives only there).

reasoning.description: 1-2 sentence rationale written *before* building the queries (the query's language is fine): which slots / explicit references you map to which lexical anchors / collection. Guided decoding decodes this field first, so the subsequent queries are conditioned on it (leading CoT).

collection_mode.description: How to apply collection: 'boost' = additive in-scope boost, excludes nothing (recall-safe, default); 'filter' = hard-restrict the search population to that collection (narrows recall — only when confident the answer lives only there).
